dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day by Nelson Mandela on overcoming challenges: 'It always seems impossible until it's done'
dailyNews.description: Nelson Mandela’s words, 'It always seems impossible until it's done,' remind us that challenges which appear insurmountable can be overcome with perseverance and belief. His quote continues to inspire generations, urging people to stay committed even when progress feels slow.

dailyNews.title: Trump's judicial confirmations show signs of slowing compared to first-term boom
dailyNews.description: President Trump is likely to make less of an impact on the federal bench in his second term because of fewer vacancies, a slower pace of retirements and the potential for Democrats to regain control of the Senate in November.

dailyNews.title: As Trump floats "taking Cuba," island's president warns of "resistance"
dailyNews.description: The leader of Cuba is vowing to put up "resistance" against the U.S. as President Trump suggests he may "take" the island nation, whose communist government has faced intense U.S. pressure and languished under energy shortages.
